mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO backup_inventory ( id, backup_id, original_id, user_id, product_id, product_name, category, quantity, unit, cost_price, selling_price, supplier, location, min_stock, expiry_date, status, note, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.backupId}, #{item.originalId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.category}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unit}, #{item.costPrice}, #{item.sellingPrice}, #{item.supplier}, #{item.location}, #{item.minStock}, #{item.expiryDate}, #{item.status}, #{item.note}, #{item.createdAt} )
